translations.landing.pricing.faq.a1: Yes, you can Atualizar or downgrade your cloud Plano at any time. For Offline licenses, you can Atualizar by paying the difference.

translations.landing.pricing.faq.a4: Absolutely! The open Fonte core is MIT licensed. You can use it for any purpose, including commercial projects.
translations.landing.pricing.faq.a5: Yes. Flyto2 runs entirely on your computer. Your data never leaves your machine, regardless of which Plano you're on.
translations.landing.pricing.faq.a6: The Grátis Plano has generous limits that reset every month. If you reach the limit, you can wait for the Próximo month or Atualizar to Pro for unlimited access.
translations.landing.pricing.faq.a7: No. The Grátis Plano requires no credit card, no Conta and no commitment. Just Baixar and Iniciar automating.
translations.landing.pricing.faq.a8: Desktop Pro runs on your computer — perfect for privacy and Offline use. Cloud plans Adicionar Equipe Recursos like shared Fluxos de trabalho and collaboration.
